title: TWIST & SCOUT: Grounding Multimodal LLM-Experts by Forget-Free Tuning

methodology.approach: Fine-tuning pre-trained Vision Language Models (VLMs) for spatial understanding

related_work.limitation: Suffers from catastrophic forgetting, synthetic data lacks inter-object relationships

challenges: Caption-based models lack object localization abilities
Pre-training with bounding boxes requires massive datasets and computational resources
Parameter-efficient methods like LoRA underfit due to complexity differences

proposed_solution.framework: LynX (Lin king e X perts for visual grounding)
benefits: Enables VLMs to acquire grounding capabilities via fine-tuning
Prevents catastrophic forgetting of pre-trained skills
dataset_features: Captures meaningful spatial relationships and reasoning steps

training_methodology.mechanism: Breaking down tasks into intermediate steps with individual loss functions

evaluation.purpose: Fair comparison of VLMs with free-form grounded responses

contributions: Introduction of LynX framework with Dual Mixture of Experts
